rulings.Case Title: EVA HALL VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 22, 2010, line 9. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED ON STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS GROUNDS. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO STATE FACTS AND UNCERTAINTY. FOR THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION (MEDICAL NEGLIGENCE) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WHEN PLAINTIFF SAW EACH DOCTOR, WHEN SHE STOPPED SEEING THEM, AND WHAT EACH DEFENDANT'S CONTRIBUTION WAS TO THE ALLEGED FAILURE TO DIAGNOSE BUDD-CHIARI. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS, SHOWING HOW EACH DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT. FOR THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD), PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH PARTICULARITY THE FACTS SHOWING HOW/WHEN/WHERE/WHAT/TO WHOM THE MISREPRESENTATION OR CONCEALMENT OCCURRED AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: EVA HALL VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 22, 2010, line 9. DEFENDANT WADE AUBRY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: EVA HALL VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Dennis Shen'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 22, 2010, line 9. Defendant Dennis Shen'S Demurrer To Complaint. OVERRULED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION ON STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS GROUNDS. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) FOR FAILURE TO STATE FACTS AND UNCERTAINTY. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD WITH PARTICULARITY THE FACTS SHOWING HOW/WHEN/WHERE/WHAT/TO WHOM THE MISREPRESENTATION OR CONCEALMENT OCCURRED. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO PLEAD HOW THESE ACTS PREVENTED HER FROM DISCOVERING THE INJURY/MISDIAGNOSIS =(302/CWW)
